prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: board orb clear VFX sheet for Orbwalker
Primary request: create a production candidate sprite sheet for match-3 orb clear, cascade, and combo feedback as an opaque chroma-key source image.
Subject: twelve compact VFX sprites in a 4x3 sheet: fire burst, ice shards, earth leaves and rocks, heart heal sparkle, armor shield flash, gold coin sparkle, generic orb pop, combo ring, cascade streak, small impact star, dust puff, magic trail.
Style/medium: polished stylized 2D game VFX sprites, crisp mobile readability.
Composition/framing: 4x3 sprite sheet, each effect centered with padding, no clipping.
Color palette: elemental colors plus gold and white highlights, but absolutely no cyan inside any sprite.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid cyan key background #00FFFF only.
Constraints: background must be one exact flat color #00FFFF across all non-sprite pixels; no checkerboard; no gradient; no texture; no vignette; no shadows touching background; no glow touching background; no particles touching background; no smoke touching background; no frame; no panel; no matte backdrop; no labels; no text; no logo; no watermark.
Avoid: absolutely no use of #00FFFF or near-cyan key tones inside any sprite content.
notes: Opaque chroma-key fallback source candidate only; deterministic keyed-alpha extraction required before promotion.
